title: ferray-window: no scipy.signal window functions (tukey, flattop, cosine, nuttall, etc.)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy provides 5 window functions (bartlett, blackman, hamming, hanning, kaiser). scipy.signal.windows provides ~20+ additional windows: tukey, flattop, cosine, nuttall, bohman, parzen, exponential, gaussian, general_cosine, general_hamming, dpss, chebwin, etc. ferray-window matches NumPy's 5 exactly. The scipy windows are used in advanced spectral analysis but are lower priority since they're not in NumPy proper.
